title: Small Business Saturday
summary: Shop local on Small Business Saturday and discover everything our Forest Avenue merchants have to offer. Special deals and promotions from participating businesses.
body:
Small Business Saturday is one of the most important days of the year for our local merchants. This year, the Forest Avenue BID is coordinating a district-wide celebration with exclusive deals, demonstrations, and giveaways from participating businesses along the corridor.

Pick up a passport at the BID table at 1247 Forest Ave and get it stamped at participating shops. Complete your passport for a chance to win a $250 Forest Avenue gift basket.

The event runs all day—come any time that works for you. Maps of participating businesses will be available at the start of the event and on our website. Remember: when you shop local, every dollar spent supports your neighbors.
